description_long: This is a tall, slender ceramic vase with a narrow neck, a single curved handle, and a flared rim. The body is decorated with classical black-figure motifs, including mythological or animal scenes, set against a reddish-brown background. The surface shows a matte finish with visible wear and some darkened areas, suggesting age or intentional antiquing. The base is round and slightly wider than the neck, providing stability. The handle is attached from the rim to the shoulder, and the mouth is wide enough for small floral arrangements. The overall form and decoration evoke ancient Greek pottery, making it a striking decorative piece.
description: A tall, slender ceramic vase with a single handle and classical black-figure motifs on a reddish-brown background, reminiscent of ancient Greek pottery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle on the left and detailed black-figure motifs of animals or mythological scenes.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle centered and minimal decoration, mostly showing the plain reddish-brown surface.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the right and partial visibility of the decorative motifs wrapping around the body.
description_view_3: Opposite front view highlighting a different section of the black-figure motifs, with the handle not visible.
